name: Creole Cheese'n Peanut Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter, shredded cheddar cheese, cayenne pepper, and salt together in a large mixing bowl.
2. Mix in all-purpose flour, then oven-toasted rice cereal and finely chopped peanuts.
3. Press the dough into a small loaf pan and chill in the freezer until firm.
4. Place the chilled dough on a cutting board; cut into 1/8-inch thick slices.
5. Place the slices 1 inch apart on cookie sheets; bake in a preheated oven at 325°F for 12 to 15 minutes, or until golden.
6. Transfer the crackers to a wire rack.
7. Serve warm or at room temperature.
